ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the driver belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the driver */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Vehicle number assigned to the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the team */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Sponsors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., oval, road course) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the event takes place */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., practice, qualifying, race) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_events_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Driver's position in the event */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Driver's start position in the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the event */,
  "fastest_lap" REAL /* Fastest lap time achieved by the driver */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_data" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the lap */,
  "sector1_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete sector 1 */,
  "sector2_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete sector 2 */,
  "sector3_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete sector 3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_data_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the driver or team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the driver or team in the standings */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins achieved by the driver or team */,
  "podiums" INTEGER /* Number of podium finishes achieved by the driver or team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., driver, team owner, official, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's logout */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
